texts.title: Pyrgi Tablet — Etruscan portion
texts.source: Museo Nazionale di Villa Giulia, Rome
texts.translation: This temple and this sanctuary ... (partial; bilingual context from Phoenician side)
texts.notes: Bilingual with Phoenician — key for proper-name and formulaic pattern extraction.

texts.title: Liber Linteus — ritual calendar excerpt
texts.notes: Longest continuous Etruscan text; priority for full line-by-line training pack.
